title: Hygiene & Cleanliness
description: I would like to raise a concern regarding cleanliness and hygiene in the mess area. Proper hygiene while cooking and serving food is essential for students’ health. Kindly take necessary action.

title: Hostel Wi-Fi Connectivity Issue
description: The hostel Wi-Fi connection is very unstable and frequently disconnects. This is affecting online classes, assignments, and daily academic work. Kindly resolve this issue at the earliest.

title: Frequent Disconnection
description: The hostel Wi-Fi disconnects repeatedly throughout the day. Due to this, online activities like lectures, exams, and project work are getting disturbed. Please fix this issue permanently.

title: Food quality
description: food quality is not upto the mark.

title: Repetitive Menu Issue
description: The current mess menu feels very repetitive, which affects students’ interest in meals. Adding more variety and balanced food options will greatly improve the overall mess experience.
